title: Postmark Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Postmark worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Postmark Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Postmark is transactional email delivery done right that positions itself for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email. Founded in 2010, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Postmark is a solid choice for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email. Its paid-only pricing reflects its focus on serious senders. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Postmark starts at $0/month, with paid plans from $15/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Postmark works best for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Postmark does not offer a free plan. Paid plans start at $15/month.

faq.q: What is Postmark best used for?
faq.a: Postmark is best for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email. Its standout features include transactional email, api access, analytics.
Postmark is aimed at users with some email marketing experience.

faq.q: Does Postmark have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Postmark does not currently offer an affiliate program.
